features.title: 统一 Agent Runtime 入口
features.gap: Renderer still has intent branches (B10). Executor tool dispatch still if/elif (B9).

features.title: Schema-driven Planner
features.claude_claw_target: Schema-based tool matching replaces keyword routing
features.gap: Legacy planner fully isolated. Schema scoring is lightweight fallback. B4 needed for model-structured output.

features.title: Planner Model 结构化输出
features.claude_claw_target: LLM produces structured JSON plan, not just lexical scoring

evidence.note: _call_planner_model exists but gated by MAOMIAI_SCHEMA_PLANNER_MODEL env

features.gap: Planner model path exists but is not enabled by default. Falls through to lexical scoring. Need B4 to make it production.

features.title: Tool Registry / MCP Runtime
features.claude_claw_target: Dynamic tool registry, MCP protocol, runtime tool registration

evidence.note: 134 lines, invoke_mcp with HTTP and LOCAL dispatch

features.gap: MCP invoker LOCAL dispatch still has if/elif per tool name (B9). Should be registry-driven.

features.title: Executor 执行 plan.steps
features.claude_claw_target: Execute plan steps with tool dispatch, result collection

evidence.note: 182 lines, execute_plan iterates plan.tools not plan.steps

features.gap: Executor iterates plan.tools with if/elif dispatch (time.now, weather.query, web.search, etc.). Should use tool registry. Capability.status hardcoded (B12).

features.title: Observation / Replan Loop
features.claude_claw_target: Observer evaluates step results, triggers replan if needed
features.gap: Observer/replanner exist and are wired. Replanner is LLM-based but could be more sophisticated with multi-step reasoning.

features.title: Approval / Sandbox
features.claude_claw_target: Approval gate, sandboxed execution, security policies
features.gap: Full approval+sandbox pipeline. Could use more granular policies (file-level, network-level).

features.title: Run Store / Session / Replay
features.claude_claw_target: Run persistence, session management, timeline replay
features.gap: Full run+session+replay pipeline. Timeline replay available in desktop UI.

features.title: Filesystem Tools
features.gap: Filesystem tools exist with sandbox isolation. Missing: workspace-aware file editing like Claude Code (in-place edits, diff-based).

features.title: Shell Execution Tools
features.claude_claw_target: Sandboxed shell command execution with approval
features.gap: Shell execution exists with sandbox + approval. Missing: auto-repair loop (build → test → fix), stronger output parsing.

features.title: Browser / Web Tools
features.claude_claw_target: Web page fetch, web search, browser snapshots

evidence.note: 252 lines, fetch_url with SSRF protection, snapshot
NOT at expected path; actual is runtime/web_search_runtime.py

features.gap: Full browser+search+weather stack. Search uses DuckDuckGo/Bing HTML scraping. Could use API-based search for reliability.

features.title: Capability Registry
features.claude_claw_target: External schema-driven capability matching, no hardcoded keywords

evidence.note: 260 lines, schema-driven match_capabilities, NO hardcoded keyword tables

features.gap: Capability registry fully schema-driven. B11 fix confirmed: time.current/time.relative in schema, no Python keyword tables. Executor still has capability.status hardcoded (B12).

features.title: Repo Memory / Brain Assets
features.claude_claw_target: Repository memory, brain assets, GitHub stars knowledge

evidence.note: Rich directory: manifests, model_catalog, video_catalog, repos, reports
3 files: starred repos JSON + MD + classified

features.gap: Full repo memory + brain assets. Enterprise-grade with fix records, context snapshots, knowledge search. Could auto-update from git.

features.title: Multi-Agent Runtime
features.claude_claw_target: Team-based multi-agent coordination with worker roles

evidence.note: 1 team with 4 agents: coordinator, researcher, builder, reviewer

features.gap: Team structure exists with registry and coordinator. Workers are simulated via capability_tags, not truly independent agent instances. Needs real worker spawning.

features.title: Desktop Chat Integration
features.claude_claw_target: Frontend chat wired to agent/run with session management
features.gap: Desktop works for demo but has: MODEL_CATALOG_FALLBACK hardcoded, inferViewFromText with Chinese keyword routing, test buttons with hardcoded messages (B6). Needs cleanup.

features.title: Single Source Win/Mac Packaging
features.claude_claw_target: Same codebase builds for both platforms, no code fork
missing_terms: tauri resources (partial - only 6 of 19 services in resources)
features.gap: Single source confirmed (C15 audit). But only 6 of 7 workbench services in start scripts (missing artifact/code_review/document/design). tauri.conf.json resources incomplete for full enterprise deployment.

reason: Core Agent Runtime exists with full pipeline (planner→executor→validator→renderer).
Schema planner + capability registry are schema-driven, no hardcoded keywords in production path.
But: Planner model structured output is not enabled by default (B4).
Executor still uses if/elif tool dispatch instead of registry (B9).
Desktop has hardcoded fallbacks and test buttons (B6).
Multi-agent is structural but not truly parallel.
Cross-platform packaging missing 4 enterprise services in start scripts.

P0_critical.title: Planner Model Structured Output
P0_critical.description: Enable MAOMIAI_SCHEMA_PLANNER_MODEL by default, wire to model gateway, produce structured JSON plans instead of lexical scoring fallback
P0_critical.impact: Planner accuracy, tool selection quality, Claude/Claw parity

P0_critical.title: Executor Tool Dispatch Registry化
P0_critical.description: Replace if/elif tool dispatch in executor.py with MCP registry lookup. executor should call invoke_mcp or tools.py adapter based on registry.
P0_critical.impact: Extensibility, new tools require zero executor code changes

P0_critical.title: 清 executor capability.status 硬编码
P0_critical.description: Remove hardcoded capability.status handling from executor, route through capability registry service call instead.
P0_critical.impact: Consistency, single source of truth for capability resolution

P1_important.title: 清 desktop router dry_run / 固定测试按钮
P1_important.description: Remove MODEL_CATALOG_FALLBACK, inferViewFromText keyword routing, hardcoded test messages from windows-demo-stable-router.js

P1_important.title: Renderer intent 分支清理
P1_important.description: Replace intent-based branches in renderer.py with schema-driven formatting, remove hardcoded intent strings

P1_important.title: Model/Profile/Provider 配置归一
P1_important.description: Consolidate scattered model config into single schema-driven model profile registry

P1_important.title: 离线模型预种/Demo Pack
P1_important.description: Pre-seed model weights for demo, ensure offline operation

P2_nice_to_have.title: Real Worker Agent Spawning
P2_nice_to_have.description: Replace simulated multi-agent with actual parallel worker instances

next_priority: C25-C14-B12: 清 executor capability.status 硬编码 (P0)
C25-C14-B10: Renderer intent 分支清理 (P1)
